SQLLite.SQL: ( SELECT J.JUDG_SEQ AS "JudgmentSeqNo" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "AddressId" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "Line1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "Line2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "Line3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "Line4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "Line5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "PostCode" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA, JUDGMENTS J WHERE J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = J.CASE_NUMBER AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND NVL(GA.VALID_TO, TRUNC(SYSDATE+1)) >= NVL(J.JUDGMENT_DATE, TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ) UNION ( SELECT J.JUDG_SEQ AS "JudgmentSeqNo" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "AddressId" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "Line1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "Line2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "Line3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "Line4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "Line5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "PostCode" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA, JUDGMENTS J, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR2 WHERE J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = J.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = J.CASE_NUMBER AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND NVL(GA.VALID_TO, TRUNC(SYSDATE+1)) >= NVL(J.JUDGMENT_DATE, TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ) UNION ( SELECT J.JUDG_SEQ AS "JudgmentSeqNo" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "AddressId" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "Line1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "Line2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "Line3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "Line4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "Line5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "PostCode" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA, JUDGMENTS J, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR3 WHERE J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR3.CASE_NUMBER = J.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR3.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR3.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.PARTY_ID = CPR3.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND NVL(GA.VALID_TO, TRUNC(SYSDATE+1)) >= NVL(J.JUDGMENT_DATE, TRUNC(SYSDATE)) )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser
